parameters.sparkScript:
#pip3 install gitpython

import os
import requests
import git
import json
import shutil
import zipfile
import glob

def generate_auth_token(url, payload, host, headers=None):
    if headers is None:
        headers = {}
    headers["Host"] = host
    headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
    response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=payload, timeout=10, verify=False)
    response.raise_for_status()
    response_data = response.json()
    token = response_data.get("token")
    return token

def download_file(api_url, output_path, host, headers):
    if headers is None:
        headers = {}
    headers["Host"] = host
    headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
    if os.path.exists(output_path):
        os.remove(output_path)
        print(f"Existing file removed: {output_path}")
    response = requests.get(api_url, headers=headers, stream=True, verify=False)
    if response.status_code == 200:
        with open(output_path, "wb") as file:
            for chunk in response.iter_content(chunk_size=8192):
                file.write(chunk)
        print(f"File downloaded: {output_path}")
    else:
        raise Exception(f"Failed to download file. Status code: {response.status_code}")

def clone_repo(repo_url, local_path, branch, oauth_token):
    if os.path.exists(local_path):
        print(f"Repository already exists at {local_path}. Cleaning up...")
        shutil.rmtree(local_path)
        print(f"Existing repository removed from {local_path}")
    auth_url = repo_url.replace("https://", f"https://{oauth_token}@")
    repo = git.Repo.clone_from(auth_url, local_path, branch=branch)
    print(f"Repository cloned to {local_path}")
    return repo

def commit_and_push(repo, file_paths, commit_message):
    repo.index.add(file_paths)
    repo.index.commit(commit_message)
    origin = repo.remote(name="origin")
    origin.push()
    print(f"Committed and pushed: {file_paths}")

def extract_zip(zip_path, extract_to):
    with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'r') as zip_ref:
        zip_ref.extractall(extract_to)
    print(f"Extracted ZIP contents to {extract_to}")

def convert_bool_to_yes_no(value):
    if value.strip().lower() == 'true':
        return 'yes'
    else:
        return 'no'

def pretty_print_json(directory):
    json_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(directory, "**", "*.json"), recursive=True)
    for json_file in json_files:
        with open(json_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as file:
            data = json.load(file)
        with open(json_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as file:
            json.dump(data, file, indent=4, ensure_ascii=False)
        print(f"Formatted JSON: {json_file}")

# API Details
internal_node_ip = sc._jvm.com.syntasa.utils.SystemUtils.messagingServer().split(":")[0]
port = "@port".replace("'","").strip()
base_url = f"https://{internal_node_ip}:{port}"
generate_token_url = f"{base_url}/loginUser"
appid = str(synutils.object.getAction().getApp().getId())
appkey = str(synutils.object.getAction().getApp().getKey())
environment = str(synutils.object.getAction().getEnvironment())
includeNotes = convert_bool_to_yes_no("@includeNotes")
export_url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/export/app?appId={appid}&environment={environment}&includeNotes={includeNotes}"
username = "@username".replace("'","").strip()
password = "@password".replace("'","").strip()
host = "@hostname".replace("'","").strip()
credentials = {"authType": "LOCAL","username": username,"password": password}
zip_file_path = "/tmp/export.zip"

# Git Repo Details
oauth_token = str(synutils.object.getAction().getJobStep().getProcessDetails().getInputConnection().getParameters().getAuthToken())
r_protocol = str(synutils.object.getAction().getJobStep().getProcessDetails().getInputConnection().getParameters().getProtocol()).lower()
r_url = str(synutils.object.getAction().getJobStep().getProcessDetails().getInputConnection().getParameters().getUrl())
repo_url = f"{r_protocol}://{r_url}"
branch = "@branch".replace("'","").strip()
local_repo_path = "./repo"

# Start of process
token = generate_auth_token(generate_token_url, credentials, host)
bearer_token = { "Authorization": f"Bearer {token}" }

download_file(export_url, zip_file_path, host, bearer_token)
repo = clone_repo(repo_url, local_repo_path, branch, oauth_token)

dest_dir = os.path.join(local_repo_path, appkey, environment.lower())
os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
extract_zip(zip_file_path, dest_dir)
pretty_print_json(dest_dir)
extracted_files = [
    os.path.relpath(f, local_repo_path)
    for f in glob.glob(f"{dest_dir}/**", recursive=True) if os.path.isfile(f)
]

commit_and_push(repo, extracted_files, "commit from udp")

import os
import requests
import git
import json
import shutil
import zipfile
import glob

def generate_auth_token(url, payload, host, headers=None):
    if headers is None:
        headers = {}
    headers["Host"] = host
    headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
    response = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=payload, timeout=10, verify=False)
    response.raise_for_status()
    response_data = response.json()
    token = response_data.get("token")
    return token

    if headers is None:
        headers = {}
    headers["Host"] = host
    headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
    if os.path.exists(output_path):
        os.remove(output_path)
        print(f"Existing file removed: {output_path}")
    response = requests.get(api_url, headers=headers, stream=True, verify=False)
    if response.status_code == 200:
